createTicket.title: Create Task
createTicket.subject: Subject
createTicket.descriptionHint: Please try to be as specific as possible. Please include any details you think may be relevant, such as troubleshooting steps you've taken.
createTicket.validSubject: Please enter a valid Subject. Subject must contain at least {{min}} characters.
createTicket.validIssue: Please enter a valid issue. Issue must contain at least {{min}} characters.

createAccount.title: Create User
createAccount.subtitle: Please provide user details below
createAccount.name: Name
createAccount.usernameMinLength: Username must contain at least 4 characters.
createAccount.nameMinLength: Name must contain at least 1 character.
createAccount.selectRole: Please select a role for this user
createAccount.selectGroup: Please select a group for this user.

createDepartment.title: Create Section
createDepartment.accessAllGroups: Access all current and new groups?
createDepartment.accessPublicGroups: Access all current and new public groups?
createDepartment.validName: Please enter a valid section name. (Must contain 2 characters)
createDepartment.noGroupSelected: Can not create section without a group selected or all groups enabled!
createDepartment.noTeamSelected: Can not create section without a team selected!

createGroup.title: Create Group
createGroup.validName: Please enter a valid Group name. (Must contain 2 characters)

createTeam.title: Create Team
createTeam.validName: Please enter a valid Team name. (Must contain 2 characters)

createNotice.title: Create Notice
createNotice.validName: Please enter a notice name. (Must contain 2 characters)
createNotice.validMessage: Please enter a notice message. (Must contain 10 characters)

createRole.title: Create Role
createRole.hint: Once created, the role will become editable in the permission editor
createRole.validName: Please enter a valid role name. Role name must contain at least 3 characters.

createTag.title: Create Tag
createTag.hint: Tags categorize tickets, making it easy to identify issues
createTag.validName: Please enter a valid tag name. Tag name must contain at least 2 characters.

createTicketType.title: Create Task Type
createTicketType.validName: Please enter a valid task type name

deleteRole.title: Remove Role
deleteRole.hint: Please select the role you wish to assign ALL users to
deleteRole.warning: WARNING: This will change all accounts with role
deleteRole.adminWarning: The role you are about to remove is an admin role. Please ensure there is another Admin role or you could be locked out!

deletePriority.title: Remove Priority
deletePriority.hint: Please select the priority you wish to reassign tickets to in order to delete this priority
deletePriority.warning: WARNING: This will change all tasks with a priority of:

addPriority.title: Add Priorities
addPriority.hint: Please select the priorities you wish to add to type: {{typeName}}

deleteStatus.title: Remove Task Status
deleteStatus.hint: Please select the task status you wish to reassign tasks to in order to delete this status.
deleteStatus.warning: WARNING: This will change all tasks with status

deleteType.title: Remove Task Type
deleteType.hint: Please select the task type you wish to reassign tasks to in order to delete this type.
deleteType.warning: WARNING: This will change all tasks with type

linkWarning.title: Redirect Warning
linkWarning.message: You are being redirected to a site outside this domain. Proceed with caution.

teams.title: Teams
teams.deleteWarning: Agents may lose access to resources once this team is deleted.

departments.title: Sections
departments.deleteWarning: Agents may lose access to resources once this department is deleted.

groups.title: Groups
groups.deleteWarning: Agents may lose access to resources once this group is deleted.
groups.deleteAssociatedWarning: Groups that are associated with ticket cannot be deleted.

settings.title: Settings
settings.siteTitleHint: Title of site. Used as page title.
settings.siteUrlHint: Publicly accessible URL of this site.
settings.serverTimezoneHint: Set the local server timezone for date display
settings.serverTimezoneTooltip: User can override in user profile. Requires Server Restart
settings.timeFormatHint: Set the format for time display
settings.shortDateFormatHint: Set the format for short dates
settings.longDateFormatHint: Set the format for long dates
settings.siteLogoHint: Upload site logo to display in top navigation.
settings.siteLogoNote: Note: Resize to max width of 140px
settings.pageLogoHint: Upload logo to display within page views.
settings.colorSchemeHint: Select the colors for your color scheme.
settings.headerPrimaryHint: Text and icon color within the header
settings.colorTertiaryHint: Accent color, used for links, some buttons, and notifications
settings.defaultTicketTypeHint: Default task type for newly created tasks.
settings.allowPublicTicketsHint: Allow the creation of tasks by unregistered users.
settings.allowAgentUserTickets: Allow Staff to Submit Tasks on Behalf of Users
settings.allowAgentUserTicketsHint: Allow the creation of tasks by staff on behalf of users.
settings.showOverdueTicketsHint: Enable/Disable flashing of tasks based on SLA time of type priority.
settings.showOverdueTicketsTooltip: If disabled, priority SLA times will not mark tasks overdue.
settings.minSubjectLengthHint: Minimum character limit for task subject
settings.minIssueLengthHint: Minimum character limit for task description
settings.ticketPrioritiesHint: Task priorities set the level of SLAs for each task.
settings.defaultUserRoleHint: Role assigned to users created during sign-up and public tickets
settings.permissionsNote: Note: Changes take affect after page refresh
settings.permissionsTooltip: Permission order is top down. ex: Admins at top; Users at bottom.
settings.backupNowHint: Backup all site data. (Database, Attachments, Assets)
settings.deletedTicketsHint: Tasks marked as deleted are shown below.
settings.mongoDbToolsHint: Unable to locate MongoDB tools. Please make sure MongoDB tools are installed.
settings.mongoDbToolsRequired: MongoDB Tools are required to perform backup and restore. See below for instructions on installing MongoDB Tools.
settings.maintenanceModeHint: Only Administrators are allowed to login.
settings.privacyPolicyHint: Paste in HTML/Text of your privacy policy.
settings.allowUserRegistrationHint: Allow users to create accounts on the login screen.
settings.passwordComplexityHint: Require users passwords to meet minimum password complexity
settings.passwordComplexityTooltip: Minimum 8 characters with uppercase and numeric.
settings.connectionStatusHint: Current connection status to the Elasticsearch server.
settings.indexStatusHint: Current status of the index. if the status is not green, the index may need rebuilding.
settings.esServerConfigHint: The connection settings to the Elasticsearch server.
settings.esServerConfigTooltip: Changing server settings will require a rebuild of the index and server restart.
settings.rebuildIndexTooltip: Rebuilding the index should only occur if the index is out of sync with the database, or has not been initialized. Rebuilding will take some time.
settings.confirmRebuildIndex: Are you sure you want to rebuild the index?
settings.mailerHint: Preferences for trudesk to send email notifications to users.
settings.connectionFailed: Connection Failed. Did you apply settings?
settings.mailerCheckHint: Poll an IMAP mailbox for messages to convert to tickets
settings.settingsAppliedAfterRestart: Settings are applied after server restart
settings.allowSelfSignedCertHint: Allow less secure self signed certificates when checking mailbox.
settings.pollingIntervalHint: How often to poll the server for new messages (Minutes)
settings.pollingIntervalTooltip: Caution: Polling too often can cause high CPU usage
settings.createAccountHint: Create a user account if account does not exist.
settings.deleteMessageHint: Delete email message from INBOX once processed
settings.restartConfirm: Setting will take affect after server restart. Would you like to restart the server now?
settings.enableNewEmailTemplatesHint: The new email notification system is currently in beta.
settings.notificationTemplatesNote: Note: Not all templates have been converted for the beta

messages.title: Messages
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.passwordWarning: After changing your password, you will be logged out of all sessions.
profile.twoFactorNotEnabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled yet
profile.twoFactorDescription: Enabling two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your accounts. Once enabled, you will be required to enter both your password and an authentication code in order to sign into your account. After you successfully enable two-factor authentication, you will not be able to login unless you enter the correct authentication code.
profile.twoFactorDisableHint: By disabling two-factor authentication, your account will be protected with only your password.
profile.scanQrCode: Scan the QR code below using any authenticator app such as Authy, Google Authenticator, LastPass Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator
profile.manualKeyHint: If you are unable to scan the QR code, open the authenticator app and select the option that allows you to enter the below key manually.
profile.verifyCodeHint: After scanning the QR code, enter the 6-digit verification code below to activate two-factor authentication on your account.
